objective: Implement a fork-only runtime fix so Qwen3.5 presets boot reliably after qwen3_next started importing flashinfer directly, while preventing prior FlashInfer JIT exit-127 regressions.
scope: Apply minimal, reversible fork-local changes to Docker/runtime defaults, engine arg guardrails, RunPod presets, and runtime documentation across Dockerfile, docker-bake.hcl, src/engine_args.py, scripts/config_doctor.py, .runpod/hub.json, docs/runtime-compatibility.md, README.md, and aiwf.request.json.
acceptance_criteria: Qwen3.5 runtime path no longer fails with `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'flashinfer'` on fork defaults.
Runtime image includes required FlashInfer JIT toolchain components (ninja, C++ compiler, nvcc-capable path) while keeping CUDA 12.6 baseline for broad host-driver compatibility.
Engine args keep guardrails and remove contradictory preset posture that previously hard-disabled FlashInfer for Qwen3.5.
RunPod Qwen3.5 presets are coherent with the chosen strategy and docs explain both root cause and fallback behavior.
Validation gate commands complete: py_compile, config_doctor, JSON parse, and docker buildx bake --print.
tests_expected: python -c "import json; json.load(open('.runpod/hub.json')); json.load(open('aiwf.request.json')); print('json ok')"
rollback_plan: Immediate rollback is fork-local git revert of this change set to restore prior FlashInfer hard-disable behavior and base image defaults. If startup regressions appear after rollout, temporary mitigation is endpoint env override `ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASH_ATTN` and `DISABLE_FLASHINFER_PREFILL=true` while retaining installed FlashInfer package for qwen3_next import compatibility. If container/toolchain regressions are detected, revert `CUDA_IMAGE_TAG` default to previous base image and re-run validation gate before redeploy.
deploy_plan: Deploy fork-only in staged rollout (1->2->4 workers). At each stage verify cold start, successful model load, and one representative inference before scaling.
threat_model: Main risks are (1) larger CUDA devel image increasing build/pull time and (2) upstream FlashInfer wheel/toolchain drift causing runtime variance. Mitigations: keep version pins deterministic, keep runtime fallback guard to FLASH_ATTN on toolchain probe failure, fail fast for missing flashinfer on Qwen3.5, keep rollout staged 1->2->4, and retain fork-local rollback path.
